text:
very affluent, trustworthy, amiable and happy.
If Mars aspects Mercury in Sagittarius/Pisces, the native will be a leader of townsmen, or thieves,
will reside in forests and will be a famous writer.
Should Jupiter aspect Mercury in Sagittarius/Pisces, the native will be rich by memory, intelligent
nd descendency, be beautiful, noble and knowledgeable, be a kings minister, or his treasurer
and be a writer.
If Venus aspect Mercury in Sagittarius/Pisces, the native will educate boys and girls, be wealthy,
soft in disposition and brave.
If Saturn aspect Mercury in Sagittarius/Pisces, the native will be intent upon living in forests, will
eat much, be wicked, dirty and will be unsuccessful in all his undertakings.
61-66. MERCURY IN SATURNS HOUSE IN ASPECT TO OTHERS. If Mercury be in a House of
Saturn and is aspected by the Sun, one will be a boxer, be very strong, one will eat
abundantly, be censured, will speak sweetly and be famous.
